title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・未踏の栄光

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sky was overcast before the race, but now it's
bright and sunny.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That was amazing. You did so well!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To think I would receive this amount of praise and
congratulations...
choice_data_list: Look at what you just did! You deserve it all!
Look at what you just did! You deserve it all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. I feel as though I finally understand now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What sort of objective I had actually set...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And the joy of accomplishing it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes... more than I could possibly put into words!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
At times I felt troubled and wrestled with
self-doubt. But I never gave in, and for that, I am
happy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Happy to be the first Mejiro to achieve victory in
the Twin Tenno Sho!
